# Sidecar Advisory

> Fractional AI advisory and workflow automation for Metro Detroit small professional service firms.
> Neil Barris helps insurance agencies, law firms, accounting practices, and real estate offices
> implement practical AI with guaranteed results. Free 45-minute Workflow Audit — find at least
> $5,000 in annual savings or walk away with a written workflow review at no charge.

## About

Neil Barris is a fractional AI advisor based in Metro Detroit, Michigan. He spent nearly a decade
in customer success and technology adoption before founding Sidecar Advisory to help small
professional service firms implement practical, measurable AI. He works exclusively with
service-based businesses that want plain-English guidance, not vendor demos. Contact:
hello@sidecaradvisory.com | (248) 291-7642.

## Services

- [Home / Overview](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/): Services, pricing, and the $5,000 savings guarantee
- [Pricing](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/pricing/): Full pricing for all services — Workflow Audit (free), implementation, retainer, workshops
- [Contact](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/contact/): Book a free Workflow Audit or send a general inquiry
- [Savings Calculator](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/savings-calculator/): Free 90-second estimate of AI time and cost savings for your firm

- [AI for Insurance Agencies](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/insurance-agencies/): Practical AI service page for Metro Detroit independent insurance agencies
